creator: dev.ashevchuk@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #3)
Thanks for the recommendations.
Makefile fixed.
The port can be built without problems with poudriere.
In addition, the portlint output is clean.
Unfortunately, without redefining (CC=clang) and using "lang/go14", I did not manage to build this port.
